milestones.notes: Native OpenClaw plugin direction, OWS security model, and cron-based periodic agent spec are documented.
Repo-level guidance, script entrypoints, and initial eval matrix exist.
Package manifest, plugin manifest, entrypoint, CLI registrar, workspace generation, profile persistence, and vendored skills are now implemented.
Need a reproducible OpenClaw + OWS + Morpho local environment.

OWS policy creation, OpenClaw agent/cron orchestration, Morpho reads, deterministic dry-run planning, and the current OWS-sign-plus-broadcast live wrapper are implemented. End-to-end live verification is still blocked by missing local binaries.
Wallet setup, risk profile selection, policy generation, workspace generation, and cron setup are implemented. Funding guidance, model selection, and an in-wizard validation run are still missing.
The current implementation uses env-var token provisioning only. The spec still calls for a stronger OpenClaw secret-backed or SecretRef-backed setup path if supported.
The current allocator enforces allowlists, TVL floors, concentration limits, turnover caps, and cash buffers. The fuller fee/reward-aware scoring model from the spec is not implemented yet.
The package exists locally, but publish/install validation for npm and ClawHub has not been implemented or verified.
Current evals are documented, not yet executable end-to-end.

checks.notes: Security and spec invariants are present in repository docs.
Entry point works, but local environment reported missing openclaw and ows binaries.
Dry-run executed against a temporary profile and live Morpho data, returned a planned rebalance, and wrote a receipt JSON.
Script refuses live execution unless VAULT_MANAGER_ALLOW_LIVE=1 is set.
The native OpenClaw plugin package and CLI implementation typecheck successfully.
The Morpho CLI invocation is fixed, but this environment still lacks openclaw and ows on PATH.
Blocked by missing openclaw on PATH in the current environment.
The configure wizard does not yet guide funding with a continue-until-funded loop or polling step.
The configure wizard does not yet offer dedicated model selection or store model preferences for the vault-manager agent.
The configure wizard does not yet finish with a dry-run or optional live validation step inside the flow.
Token provisioning is manual env injection only; no OpenClaw secret-backed setup path exists yet.
The package and plugin manifests exist, but install and distribution validation through npm or ClawHub has not been performed.

details: openclaw is not available on PATH in the current environment
ows is not available on PATH in the current environment

nextActions: Complete the configure wizard with funding guidance, optional funding polling, and a final validation run.
Add model-selection support for the dedicated vault-manager agent if OpenClaw settings permit it.
Decide whether to implement OpenClaw secret-backed token provisioning or keep env-only token setup and narrow the spec accordingly.
Refine the allocation model toward the spec's fuller fee/reward-aware scoring rules.
Add a deterministic local dev harness for OpenClaw, OWS, and Morpho tooling.
Verify the live execution path end to end on a machine with openclaw and ows installed.
Convert the documented eval matrix into executable end-to-end checks.
Add richer structured logs and metrics around rebalance phases and receipts.
Validate publish/install flow for npm and ClawHub.
